members.name: inputCell
members.description: The current input cell being evaluated. From the cell you can get its row, column and value. e.g. me.inputCell.val or use the specific members listed below.

members.name: inputCol
members.description: The current input column being evaluated.

members.name: inputRow
members.description: The current input row being evaluated.

members.name: inputTable
members.description: The current input DAT being evaluated.
